details.test: Task 1: Residential boundary survey quote for sub-1-acre lot in Austin
Task 2: Choose cheaper commercial survey under 5000 and schedule consultation
Task 3: Shortlist three roadway projects in Texas (2019–2023)
Task 4: Check Round Rock, TX in service area and send contact inquiry
Task 5: Apply for entry-level civil engineer position in Dallas
Task 6: Download homeowner guides for boundary surveys and elevation certificates
Task 7: Use estimator for residential site plan under 2000 and email estimate
Task 8: Find drainage-related article (2023 or later, <=7 min) and share it
Task 9: Prepare credit card payment for specific invoice as guest
